# tfe_scim_token

Reads a SCIM authentication token by its ID. Requires SCIM to be enabled.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the SCIM token

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time when the SCIM token was created.
- `description` (String) The description of the SCIM token.
- `expired_at` (String) The time when the SCIM token expires.
- `last_used_at` (String) The time when the SCIM token was last used.
